# Walt Disney: A Life in Films Podcast

Mel Giedroyc steps into the magical world of Walt Disney, exploring his extraordinary life through the stories of ten of the much mythologised genius's best-loved works.

UK Only

**Episodes available:** indefinitely

[Subscribe in Sounds](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sounds/brand/m0019r48)  
[RSS](https://podcasts.files.bbci.co.uk/m0019r48.rss)
